subtitle: SBOM, open-source notices and security reports for a single project — in one run

form.title: Scan settings
form.description: Enter your project details and pick what to generate.

source.label: Scan target
source.currentDirHint: Scans the source in this folder (mounted as /src). To scan a different folder, run --ui from there.
source.rootfsHint: Scans an OS rootfs or any subfolder under the current folder (/src) as a directory. Paths outside the folder are rejected — place the rootfs under the launch folder, or use a Docker image instead.
source.gitHint: Public repos clone directly; for private repos enter a token below.
source.gitTokenHint: Only for private repos. Used once for the clone; never stored or logged.
source.sbomAnalyzeHint: Notice + security reports are enabled automatically for the risk analysis.
source.firmwareHint: Unpacks, then identifies components with syft + cve-bin-tool (.bin/.img/.squashfs…).
source.firmwareUnavailable: Firmware analysis requires launching the UI from the firmware image.
source.dockerHint: Scans a local/remote Docker image (Docker socket required).

options.identifyVendoredHint: For C/C++ source with no package manager. Sends file fingerprints (not source) to the OSSKB service.

progress.title: Run log
progress.waiting: Live logs will appear here once a scan starts.

result.title: Results
result.vendoredHintTitle: Few components found — is this C/C++ embedded source?
result.vendoredHintBody: Open source is often copied (vendored) into C/C++ sources that have no package manager, where a normal scan can't see it. Turn on "Identify bundled open source" under Advanced and run again. Only file fingerprints are sent — your source stays local.
result.vendoredBadgeHint: Identified by SCANOSS as open source copied into the sources

riskReport.title: Open-source risk report
riskReport.desc: Consolidated supply-chain risk analysis across licenses and vulnerabilities.

sbom.title: SBOM (CycloneDX)
sbom.desc: The normalized software bill of materials in CycloneDX JSON.

notice.title: Open-source notice
notice.desc: License notices and attributions for the bundled components.

conformance.title: Conformance report
conformance.desc: Format validation of the submitted SBOM.

security.title: Security report
security.desc: Known vulnerabilities (CVE) found in the components.

signature.title: SBOM signature
signature.desc: Cosign signature for verifying the SBOM.

deps.loadError: Could not load the SBOM for the dependency view.
deps.flatFallback: This SBOM has no dependency graph; showing a flat component list.
deps.tooLarge: The graph has {{count}} nodes (over {{cap}}); use the tree view instead.
deps.graphError: The dependency graph could not be rendered.
deps.graphLegend: Red nodes are direct dependencies; arrows point from a package to what it depends on.

sourceTree.loadError: Could not load the ScanCode results.

validation.required: Enter a project name and version (and any required input).
